_comment: Native-plant nurseries, seed houses and native-plant societies for the prairie provinces (V2.18). Feeds the 'Where to buy near you' site-panel section via src/db/nurseries.py. The 'sells' field maps to the availability_class enum (native_specialist / seed_or_plug / garden_centre) so it can be matched to a plant's sourcing tier.
_disclaimer: Compiled 2026 as a STARTING POINT, not a verified live directory. Businesses move, change stock, or close, and native plants are often seasonal and limited — always confirm hours, location and current native availability before visiting or ordering. Coordinates are APPROXIMATE (community/city level), used only to sort suppliers by rough distance. URLs are intentionally left blank rather than guessed; search the name + city. Entries flagged 'verify' in notes are less certain and should be confirmed first.
_provenance: Prairie native-plant community knowledge and the project's sourcing notes (src/sourcing.py, scripts/apply_sourcing_data.py). No affiliation or endorsement implied.

nurseries.name: Blazing Star Wildflower Seed Company
nurseries.notes: Saskatchewan-grown native prairie wildflower and grass seed; ships province-wide, so it serves Saskatoon, Regina, Lumsden and the Battlefords. Seed, not potted plants.

nurseries.name: Prairie Garden Seeds
nurseries.notes: Long-running family seed house (Ternier family) of heritage, open-pollinated and some native prairie seed. Near the Battlefords; mail-orders across SK.

nurseries.name: A Prairie Bouquet
nurseries.notes: Small native/perennial grower west of Saskatoon (verify current status and hours before visiting).

nurseries.name: Early's Farm & Garden Centre
nurseries.notes: Established Saskatoon garden centre and seed retailer; carries prairie-hardy stock and some native seed. Ask staff for natives — stock is seasonal.

nurseries.name: Wilson's Greenhouse & Garden Centre
nurseries.notes: Large Saskatoon-area greenhouse; prairie-hardy perennials, trees and shrubs. Native selection varies — call ahead.

nurseries.name: Dutch Growers Home & Garden
nurseries.notes: Saskatoon garden centre with an online shop; prairie-hardy perennials and woody stock. Native availability is seasonal.

nurseries.name: Lakeshore Garden Centre
nurseries.notes: Regina-area garden centre serving Regina and Lumsden; prairie-hardy stock. Ask for natives (limited/seasonal) or start from seed via the SK seed houses (verify).

nurseries.name: Saskatchewan Native Plant Society
nurseries.notes: Non-profit, province-wide: runs native plant/seed sales and connects gardeners with local growers — the best starting point for sourcing natives anywhere in SK, including Regina, Lumsden and the Battlefords. Not a storefront.

nurseries.name: ALCLA Native Plants
nurseries.notes: Long-established Calgary native-plant nursery and seed source; wildflowers, grasses, shrubs. Ships seed.

nurseries.name: Bow Point Nursery
nurseries.notes: Native trees and shrubs grown from local provenance seed, west of Calgary.

nurseries.name: Wild About Flowers
nurseries.notes: Native wildflower and grass nursery south of Calgary; potted plants and seed.

nurseries.name: Bedrock Seed Bank
nurseries.notes: Edmonton seed house carrying native and heritage seed; mail-order.

nurseries.name: Edmonton Native Plant Group
nurseries.notes: Volunteer group running native plant sales in the Edmonton area; a good pointer to central-Alberta native stock. Not a storefront (verify sale dates).

nurseries.name: TreeTime.ca
nurseries.notes: Alberta reforestation-stock supplier; hardy native trees and shrubs as bare-root and plugs, mail-order across the prairies.
